focus_intent: /loop dynamic iter 3 closed the encoder→fire→decoder triad. Shipped decode_register_response.py (5/5 self-test + 1 synthetic end-to-end PASS) and patched fire_register_via_zck_headers.py harvest write to persist raw_hex/body_hex/resp_headers. Next iter candidates are operator-side helpers (Snap-PI-Relay-Configure.bat) + cross-lane intel review — all autonomous-resolvable items in this lane have been shipped. The remaining live-account blockers are stack-up (WSL+cvd-1) + attested-device pairing for path-A, both operator-side.
